# Playbook

This file tracks reusable moves from your prd-please sessions. Each skill appends one entry after generating an artifact. You own editing and curation; skills only append.

A move is a framing, pattern, or decision that transferred well enough to use again. After a few entries, you will start to see which decomposition patterns recur, where your PRDs tend to go thin, and what you have already learned not to repeat.
